papers.title_en: Self-Refining Segment Anything Model for Nuclei Segmentation as Contrastive Learning Approach to Label-Efficient Pathological Imaging
papers.tldr: 本研究针对数字病理中像素级标注匮乏的挑战，提出了一种自精炼的 Segment Anything Model (SAM) 框架。该方法将对比学习引入细胞核实例分割，通过自进化机制在有限标注下实现高性能分割。研究不仅缓解了对大规模手工标注的依赖，还提升了病理图像分析的效率，为标签高效型医疗影像处理提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Background/Objectives: Precise nuclei instance segmentation is a prerequisite forreliable digital pathology, yet the scarcity of pixel-level annotations remains asignificant bottleneck for deep learning models. Methods: We propose a self-evolving …

papers.title_en: MRI delta-radiomics for prediction of tumor response in muscle-invasive bladder cancer patients undergoing neoadjuvant chemotherapy
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估MRI增量放射组学（delta-radiomics）在预测肌层浸润性膀胱癌（MIBC）患者新辅助化疗（NAC）疗效中的价值。通过前瞻性分析患者化疗前后的MRI影像特征变化，研究构建了预测模型以识别治疗敏感者。结果表明，delta-radiomics特征能有效预测肿瘤缓解情况，为MIBC的个体化治疗方案选择提供了重要的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Background To investigate whether MRI-based delta-radiomics can predict treatmentresponse in patients with muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC) undergoingneoadjuvant chemotherapy (NAC). Materials and methods In this prospective study …

papers.title_en: Radiomic feature-based classification of BI-RADS 4/5 breast lesions on contrast-enhanced mammography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对 BI-RADS 4/5 级乳腺病变（尤其是结构扭曲）良恶性鉴别困难的问题，探索了对比增强乳腺摄影（CEM）中影像组学特征的分类价值。通过分析 CEM 低能量图像的纹理和统计特征，研究旨在提高诊断准确性。该方法为临床区分高风险乳腺病变提供了客观的量化依据，有助于优化诊疗决策并减少过度诊断。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Background and Objective: Differentiating benign from malignant BI-RADS4/5 lesions, particularly architectural distortions, remains challenging. Weinvestigated whether radiomics from contrast-enhanced mammography (low-energy …

papers.title_en: Multi-Institutional Annotated Multiparametric MRI Dataset of Pediatric High-Grade Gliomas
papers.tldr: 本研究针对儿童高级别胶质瘤（pHGG）与成人肿瘤在生物学和解剖学上的显著差异，发布了一个多机构合作的、经过标注的多模态MRI数据集。该数据集旨在解决儿童脑肿瘤研究中样本稀缺的问题，为开发针对儿童群体的精准诊断和治疗算法提供关键的数据支持，助力降低儿童癌症死亡率。
papers.abstract_en: Pediatric brain tumors are rare and still represent the most common solid tumors inchildren and the leading cause of cancer-related mortality in the pediatric population.Compared to adult brain tumors, they exhibit distinct biology, anatomy, and clinical …

Objectives: To exploratorily evaluate the potential of baseline dedicated breast PET(D-PET) for noninvasive prediction of pathological complete response (pCR) toneoadjuvant chemotherapy (NAC) in HER2-positive (HER2+) breast cancer, and to …

papers.title_en: Harnessing hybrid stacking ensemble learning for accurate pulmonary embolism diagnosis using tabular clinical data
papers.tldr: 肺栓塞（PE）是一种危及生命的急症，及时诊断对临床决策至关重要。本研究提出了一种混合堆叠集成学习（HSE）框架，专门用于利用表格临床数据预测PE。该框架通过整合多种算法提升了诊断的准确性与可靠性，为医疗人员提供了一个高效的辅助工具，旨在通过早期识别降低病死率并优化治疗流程。
papers.abstract_en: Pulmonary Embolism (PE) is a serious condition that can be life-threatening if notdiagnosed promptly as timely clinical decisions are critical. This research aims topresent a hybrid stacking ensemble (HSE) framework for PE prediction using tabular …

papers.title_en: Robust automatic soft tissue flap segmentation using a challenging case-enriched nnU-Net in head and neck CT images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对头颈部重建手术后皮瓣分割困难的问题，提出了一种基于挑战性案例增强的nnU-Net模型。该方法旨在解决术后放疗靶区定义复杂及自动分割图谱误差大的挑战。通过在CT图像中实现鲁棒的软组织皮瓣自动分割，该研究为临床放疗规划提供了高效的辅助工具，显著提升了分割的准确性与可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Reconstructive surgery with a flap makes the definition of postoperative radiotherapyvolumes challenging. It may also result in errors in automatic segmentation atlases oforgan-at-risk and nodal volumes. Automating flap segmentation process could assist …

papers.title_en: Radiomics model integrating MRI and ECV enhances prediction accuracy for progression in high-grade glioma
papers.tldr: 高级别胶质瘤（HGG）因高复发率和差预后成为临床难题，准确预测其进展对制定治疗方案至关重要。本研究提出了一种创新的影像组学模型，通过整合MRI影像特征与细胞外间隙分数（ECV）来评估HGG的进展风险。研究结果显示，该集成模型显著提升了预测一年内肿瘤进展的准确性，为临床医生提供了一种更可靠的无创预后评估工具，有助于优化HGG患者的个体化管理。
papers.abstract_en: Glioma is the most common primary brain tumor, with high-grade glioma (HGG)posing significant clinical challenges due to its poor survival outcomes. One-yeartumor recurrence indicates a poor prognosis, making accurate progression risk …

papers.title_en: Dual-Phase Computed Tomography-Based Deep Learning Architecture for Three-Year Survival Prediction in Hepatocellular Carcinoma
papers.tldr: 肝细胞癌是全球主要的癌症死因之一，预后评估对临床决策至关重要。本研究提出了一种利用双期CT影像的深度学习架构，旨在预测患者的三年生存率。通过自动提取和融合多期影像特征，该方法显著提升了生存预测的准确性，为肝癌患者的个性化管理和预后评估提供了强有力的技术支持，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) is a major global health burden, ranking as thesixth most common cancer and the third leading cause of cancer-related mortality.Computed tomography (CT) is widely used for HCC evaluation because of the high …

papers.title_en: MRI radiomics predicting cribriform growth informs active surveillance decision in intermediate-risk prostate cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在解决中风险前列腺癌患者在选择主动监测（AS）时，难以准确排除具有不良预后意义的筛状生长（GP4Crib+）这一临床难题。研究通过评估基于MRI的影像组学模型，探索其在预测筛状生长中的价值。结果表明，该影像组学方法能有效识别高风险组织学特征，为临床医生在制定主动监测决策时提供重要参考，有助于优化患者的个体化治疗方案。
papers.abstract_en: Objective Accurate exclusion of cribriform growth (GP4Crib+), an adverse histologicfeature in prostate cancer, remains a challenge in selecting intermediate-risk patientsfor active surveillance (AS). This study evaluates whether an MRI-based radiomics …

papers.title_en: SSL-R1: Self-Supervised Visual Reinforcement Post-Training for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在强化学习后训练中过度依赖语言先验和昂贵可验证奖励的问题，提出了SSL-R1。这是一种自监督视觉强化学习框架，旨在通过自监督机制降低对人工标注奖励的依赖，提升模型在视觉推理任务中的表现。该方法为增强MLLM的推理能力提供了一种更高效、低成本的路径，推动了多模态智能体的发展。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated thegreat potential of enhancing the reasoning abilities in multimodal large languagemodels (MLLMs). However, the reliance on language-centric priors and expensive …

papers.title_en: Fine-Grained Analysis of Shared Syntactic Mechanisms in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究深入探讨了语言模型内部机制与语言学中跨结构原则的一致性。通过对模型在处理不同句法构造时的内部表示进行细粒度分析，研究者旨在揭示模型是否利用共享的神经机制来处理具有相似逻辑的语言现象。研究发现，模型在处理不同句法任务时确实表现出了一定程度的机制重叠，这为理解大模型的句法泛化能力和内部工作原理提供了重要的实证支持。
papers.abstract_en: While language models demonstrate sophisticated syntactic capabilities, the extentto which their internal mechanisms align with cross-constructional principles studiedin linguistics remains poorly understood. This study investigates whether models …

papers.title_en: SycoPhantasy: Quantifying Sycophancy and Hallucination in Small Open Weight VLMs for Vision-Language Scoring of Fantasy Characters
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了小型开源视觉语言模型（VLM）在评估奇幻角色图像与文本描述一致性时的可靠性。通过构建SycoPhantasy基准，研究者量化了模型在评分过程中的阿谀奉承（迎合用户偏好）和幻觉现象。研究揭示了这些模型在作为视觉语言评分器时存在的偏见与局限性，为提升VLM评估的客观性提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as evaluators in tasksrequiring nuanced image understanding, yet their reliability in scoring alignmentbetween images and text descriptions remains underexplored. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
papers.tldr: Marco-MoE 是一系列开源的多语言稀疏专家混合（MoE）模型。该研究针对多语言处理需求，通过高效的“上循环”技术构建模型，其核心特点是极高的稀疏性，每个输入 token 仅激活约 5% 的参数。该模型在保持强大性能的同时显著降低了推理计算开销，为开源多语言大模型提供了一个高效且低成本的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts(MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\%of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined …

papers.title_en: HealthBench Professional: Evaluating Large Language Models on Real Clinician Chats
papers.tldr: 随着数百万临床医生开始使用ChatGPT辅助诊疗，现有的评估体系却缺乏对真实医患对话场景的覆盖。本研究推出了HealthBench Professional，这是一个专门针对真实临床医生对话设计的开放式基准测试。该基准旨在评估大语言模型在最常见的临床用例中的表现，为医疗AI的实际应用提供了更具参考价值的评估框架，填补了真实临床交互评估的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Millions of clinicians use ChatGPT to support clinical care, but evaluations of themost common use cases in model-clinician conversations are limited. We introduceHealthBench Professional, an open benchmark for evaluating large language …

papers.title_en: Where Do Prompt Perturbations Break Generation? A Segment-Level View of Robustness in LoRA-Tuned Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了大语言模型对提示词微小扰动的敏感性，指出传统方法仅关注全序列一致性而忽略了局部失效。作者针对LoRA微调模型，提出从片段层面（Segment-Level）分析鲁棒性，揭示了扰动如何导致生成中断或偏离。该研究为理解模型脆弱性提供了更细粒度的视角，有助于开发更稳健的微调策略。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are sensitive to minor prompt perturbations, yet existingrobustness methods usually enforce consistency at the whole-sequence level. Thisholistic view can hide an important failure mode: a perturbed response may remain …

papers.title_en: Whole-body CT attenuation and volume charts from routine clinical scans via evidence-grounded LLM report filtering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床CT数据中病理样本过载导致难以建立健康参考标准的问题，提出了一种利用大语言模型（LLM）过滤临床报告的方法。通过对常规扫描报告进行证据驱动的筛选，研究者成功构建了涵盖全身器官体积和组织衰减的大规模健康参考分布图表。这一方法不仅克服了手动标注的局限性，还为定量CT生物标志物的临床解读提供了重要的规范化基准，展示了LLM在挖掘医疗大数据价值方面的潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Interpreting quantitative CT biomarkers, such as organ volume and tissueattenuation, requires large-scale healthy reference distributions. However, creatingthese is challenging because clinical datasets are often heavily enriched with …

papers.title_en: Large Language Models Lack Temporal Awareness of Medical Knowledge
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前大语言模型在医学评估中忽视知识动态性的问题，探讨了模型对医学知识随时间演变的感知能力。研究指出，现有的静态考试类基准无法反映医学知识持续更新的本质。通过评估发现，LLM在处理具有时效性的医学知识时表现欠缺，难以区分过时与最新的医疗信息。这一发现强调了在开发医疗AI时，引入时间维度意识对于保障临床决策准确性的重要性。
papers.abstract_en: The existing methods for evaluating the medical knowledge of Large LanguageModels (LLMs) are largely based on atemporal examination-style benchmarks, whilein reality, medical knowledge is inherently dynamic and continuously evolves as new …

papers.title_en: Learning to See What You Need: Gaze Attention for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在处理图像时缺乏人类选择性关注机制的问题，提出了“凝视注意力”（Gaze Attention）机制。该方法模拟人类在描述场景时只关注相关区域的特性，使模型能够根据任务需求动态聚焦关键视觉信息。实验证明，该方法显著提升了模型在多模态理解和描述任务中的准确性与效率，为构建更具人类感知特性的MLLM提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: When humans describe a visual scene, they do not process the entire imageuniformly; instead, they selectively fixate on regions relevant to their intendeddescription. In contrast, current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) attend to …

papers.title_en: Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization for LLM Distillation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型蒸馏中逆向KL散度（RKL）的局限性，探讨了在结合自主探索与教师监督时存在的优化挑战。论文提出了教师引导的策略优化（TGPO）框架，通过在学生模型的策略搜索过程中引入教师模型的实时引导，确保探索方向与教师知识保持一致。该方法显著提升了蒸馏效率与模型性能，为构建高性能轻量化模型提供了有效的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: The convergence of reinforcement learning and imitation learning has positionedReverse KL (RKL) as a promising paradigm for on-policy LLM distillation, aiming tounify exploration with teacher supervision. However, we identify a critical limitation …

papers.title_en: Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training for Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在推理阶段参数固定、难以纠正固有错误的问题，提出了一种基于查询条件的测试时自我训练（Test-Time Self-Training）方法。该方法通过在推理时针对特定输入进行模型微调，实现了测试时计算量的有效扩展，显著提升了模型在复杂任务上的表现，为大语言模型的动态适应和性能增强提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are typically deployed with fixed parameters, andtheir performance is often improved by allocating more computation at inferencetime. While such test-time scaling can be effective, it cannot correct model …

papers.title_en: CA-GCL: Cross-Anatomy Global-Local Contrastive Learning for Robust 3D Medical Image Understanding
papers.tldr: 针对3D医学图像理解中细粒度视觉语言预训练（FVLP）的局限性，本文提出了CA-GCL框架。该框架通过跨解剖结构的全局-局部对比学习，实现了解剖级别视觉表示与文本描述的精准对齐。CA-GCL不仅增强了模型对复杂解剖结构的理解能力，还显著提升了在多种下游任务中的鲁棒性和泛化性能，为3D医学影像分析提供了高效的预训练新范式。
papers.abstract_en: Fine-grained Vision-Language Pre-training (FVLP) demonstrates significant potentialin 3D medical image understanding by aligning anatomy-level visual representationswith corresponding textual descriptions. However, existing FVLP paradigms often …

papers.title_en: JANUS: Anatomy-Conditioned Gating for Robust CT Triage Under Distribution Shift
papers.tldr: 针对自动CT分诊在跨机构部署时面临的分布偏移挑战，本文提出了JANUS框架。该方法利用解剖结构调节的门控机制增强视觉Transformer的表示能力，使模型能够结合解剖上下文识别临床显著发现。实验证明，JANUS在处理多样化病理和机构间差异时具有更强的鲁棒性和准确性，为实现可靠的临床自动化分诊提供了有效的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Automated CT triage requires models that are simultaneously accurate acrossdiverse pathologies and reliable under institutional shift. While Vision Transformersprovide strong visual representations, many clinically significant findings are defined …
